# SBDC Houston Center local routing

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

Organization: UH Texas Gulf Coast SBDC Network Local area: Houston and Central/North Harris County Office or partner: Houston Center SBDC

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns business planning, certification, funding during Ideation, Launch, Operations and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

- Organization: UH Texas Gulf Coast SBDC Network
- Local area: Houston and Central/North Harris County
- Office or partner: Houston Center SBDC
- ## BOSS routing summary
- Use for local business advising in the Houston Center SBDC service area.
- ## Local service area
- Houston Center SBDC is located at 1455 West Loop South, Suite 900, Houston, Texas 77027.

## People and links

- Organizations: SCORE, Small Business Development Center (SBDC), APEX Accelerator, University of Houston

## Next handoff

Ask for exact location and stage. If service area fits, route to Houston Center SBDC. If boundary is uncertain, route to Find Your SBDC.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
